question: What text logo is visible in the top left corner throughout the video? A. NOEL B. M&S tv C. Liisa D. Christmas

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with short blonde hair wearing a black top stands beside a tall artificial green Christmas tree. She is adjusting and fluffing the branches of the tree with her hands. An open cardboard box filled with red baubles sits on the floor nearby. Behind them, a black leather sofa holds a white pillow reading 'NOEL' next to a tripod floor lamp.

question: How many pillows or cushions are visible on the black leather sofa?

What action is the person performing in the video? A. falling B. adjusting C. displaying D. reading
Describe the sequence of visual events and tree preparation steps shown throughout the video clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the title text fades into view; at 6s, a presenter stands beside a decorated tree; at 12s, a woman adjusts the branches of an artificial tree; at 14s, the woman places red ornaments on the branches; at 16s, a hand fluffs the green needles closely.
